title: Market Segmentation Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Market Segmentation skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

definition_total_addressable.description: Definition of the total addressable market (industry, geography, product category boundaries)

existing_customer_data.description: Existing customer data including firmographic or demographic attributes, purchase history, and behavioral signals

revenue_margin_data.description: Revenue and margin data by customer or customer cohort

sales_marketing_funnel.description: Sales and marketing funnel data indicating where different customer types convert or drop off

third.description: Third-party market research or industry reports on market size and segment structure

customer_survey_data.description: Customer survey data including stated needs, preferences, and pain points
